message:
chore(scripts): update symbol coverage and CI scripts

Refine check_symbol_fixture_coverage.sh and
generate_symbol_fixture_coverage.py with improved detection logic.
Update ci.sh with latest build configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

     echo ""
 
+    echo "--- symbol fixture coverage matrix drift check ---"
+    scripts/check_symbol_fixture_coverage.sh
+    echo "PASS"
+    echo ""

     scripts/check_math_governance.sh
     echo "PASS"
